description_long: This is a modern, rectangular briefcase with a hard, matte blue exterior and a hinged lid that opens upward. The lid features a large, frosted translucent window, bordered by a rubber gasket for sealing, and a subtle green accent line runs vertically along the front. The main compartment is spacious and lined with a lighter, smooth material, likely plastic, and includes a removable tray or divider. Both sides of the briefcase have integrated, rectangular handles made of a semi-transparent plastic, flush with the surface for a sleek look. The front panel displays a small, green emblem resembling a stylized leaf or eco-friendly logo. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for carrying personal items or documents in an urban environment.
description: A hard, blue rectangular briefcase with a frosted windowed lid, flush side handles, and a green accent line and emblem on the front. The interior is spacious and lined with smooth plastic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid with a frosted window, green accent line, and emblem on the front panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flush, semi-transparent handle and the depth of the main compartment.
description_view_2: Top-down view of the open lid, showing the frosted window and the full rectangular shape of the briefcase.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another flush handle and a clear look at the interior tray.
attribute_handle_type: Rectangular, flush, semi-transparent plastic handles integrated into both short sides; fixed and rigid.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Simple latch closure at the front, no visible key or combination lock.
attribute_brand_logo: A small green emblem resembling a leaf is present on the front panel, but no identifiable brand.
